summary: Made two surgical exit-side seam edits: anchored the late section on Saturday night and sharpened Lena's habit of reorganizing her days around Eli's brief openings, so the jump into Chapter 3's Sunday dinner attention pattern lands more cleanly. The opening already remained distinct from the adjacent visible chapter opening, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Changed 'By the next night' to 'By Saturday night' to tighten the time bridge into the following Sunday's scene.
Added a closing sentence that makes Lena's schedule-rearranging behavior explicit before the Chapter 3 escalation.
